title: Functions & Scope
description: Deep dive into JavaScript functions, scope, closures, and advanced function concepts.
learningObjectives: Learn about scope and variable visibility
Master arrow functions and their syntax
Understand closures and their use cases

subtopics.title: Function Types
Scope & Variables
Closures
Higher-Order Functions
ES6 Classes
Asynchronous JavaScript

furtherReading: You Don't Know JS: Scope & Closures

glossary.definition: A function that has access to variables from its outer (enclosing) scope, even after the outer function has returned.
The context in which variables are declared and can be accessed.
A function that takes one or more functions as arguments or returns a function.
A function passed as an argument to another function to be executed later.
